examples: Objective to sum up our experience of carotid endarterectomy (CEA).
Endarterectomy removes fatty plaque through an incision in the neck.
Objective to evaluate the beneficial effects of microsurgical carotid endarterectomy.
In 2004 Collier botched the methodology for measuring results of carotid endarterectomy (in which plaque is removed from a major artery in the neck).
Carotid endarterectomy has a 2% mortality rate.
